name: Iter18 — StatsBar Total Reviews count increases after new review is saved
description: After a new PR review is completed and saved, the Total Reviews number in the StatsBar on the home page reflects the updated count — it should be higher than before the review was submitted.

planSteps.description: Verify the StatsBar is visible below the navbar and note the current Total Reviews number
Type https://github.com/vercel/next.js/pull/1 into the PR input field
Click the Analyze PR button and wait for the review to complete and be saved
Verify the review report is visible with a score and verdict
Verify the Total Reviews number in the StatsBar has increased by 1 compared to the value noted before the review
